alkylation reagent: the presence of NEM, a cysteine protease inhibitor that allows preservation of ubiquitinated cellular proteins
collision energy: followed by twenty HCD MS/MS scans at R = 15 000, NCE = 27
fragmentation method: followed by twenty HCD MS/MS scans
instrument: The LC–MS/MS analysis was performed on an Easy-nLC system coupled to a Thermo Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: lysis buffer (20 mM Tris–HCl [pH 8.0], 300 mM NaCl, 1% Triton X-100, 2 mM DTT) containing protease inhibitors.
